title: pseudognaphalium californicum
intro: Pseudognaphalium californicum, also known as California everlasting or California rabbitbrush, is a shrub native to the western United States and Baja California, Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pseudognaphalium californicum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Pseudognaphalium californicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
